## Corpora Considered

Machine-readable catalog: [plot4_all_source_dump_catalog.csv](../data/derived/effect_inflation_dataset/plot4_all_source_dump_catalog.csv)

Machine-readable normalized row dump: [plot4_all_source_dn_rows.csv](../data/derived/effect_inflation_dataset/plot4_all_source_dn_rows.csv)

Plot 4 now has a first-pass all-source D/N surface map with `34,268` positive-D/N points. It is intentionally a descriptive dump, not a clean inferential layer.

This first table is the feeder-corpus admission audit: what was considered, what it is, why it is in or out of the all-source dump, and how many observations made it in.

::: {.dataset-table .source-audit-table}

| Corpus considered | What it is | Why in/out | # obs in |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Published-paper endpoint candidate corpus | Paper/unit-level published endpoint candidates with recoverable D and N. | included: include every candidate paper/study unit with positive D and N from the current candidate paper-level file; mixes published-original candidates, comparator-only rows, and other paper-level candidates; source_status carries that distinction | 25,881 |
| Replication-pairs live corpus | Original and follow-up sides from the live replication-pair corpus. | included: split each live endpoint pair into original-side and follow-up-side D/N points; side-level points intentionally duplicate pair membership; this layer is descriptive, not an inferential paired analysis | 4,839 |
| Preregistered-results tables | Normalized preregistered confirmatory result rows from Plot 3. | included: include each normalized preregistered confirmatory D/N result from Plot 3; small curated layer; not an exhaustive registry of preregistered science | 3,546 |
| Staged replication harvest artifacts | Non-promoted staged harvest rows that already expose positive D and N for a side. | sidecar included: include non-promoted staged rows only when a positive D and N are already present for a side; most staged files are roster-only, native-metric, or otherwise D-blocked and therefore remain out of this D/N figure | 2 |
| Promoted harvest pair tables | Source-specific promoted harvest outputs already folded into the live replication-pair table. | not separately included: not separately loaded; promoted rows are already folded into the live replication-pairs corpus above, so direct inclusion would duplicate them | 0 |

:::

## Specific Observations Included

Machine-readable row-level file: [plot4_all_source_dn_rows.csv](../data/derived/effect_inflation_dataset/plot4_all_source_dn_rows.csv)

The specific-row layer has `34,268` positive-`D`/`N` points. It records source family, source file, row unit, row label, point id, source layer, side, `D`, `N`, and publication-boundary flags.

Layer summary:

::: {.dataset-table .compact-count-table}

| Source layer | Points | Source families | Median D | Median N |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| published_candidate_paper | 25,881 | 30 | 0.28 | 322 |
| preregistered_confirmatory_result | 3,546 | 47 | 0.25 | 251 |
| replication_pair_original | 2,425 | 89 | 0.59 | 121 |
| replication_pair_followup | 2,414 | 89 | 0.29 | 297 |
| staged_harvest_followup | 1 | 1 | 0.20 | 285 |
| staged_harvest_original | 1 | 1 | 0.48 | 92 |

:::

Largest specific source families in the dump:

::: {.dataset-table .compact-count-table}

| Source layer | Source family | Points |
| --- | --- | --- |
| published_candidate_paper | ctgov_finer_grained_kg | 7,722 |
| published_candidate_paper | gwas_catalog | 6,711 |
| published_candidate_paper | score_cos_claims | 3,193 |
| preregistered_confirmatory_result | ClinicalTrials.gov phase-2+ primary randomized registry rows | 3,149 |
| published_candidate_paper | metabus_open_bosco | 1,999 |
| replication_pair_original | FReD filtered pair table | 839 |
| replication_pair_followup | FReD filtered pair table | 831 |
| published_candidate_paper | forrt_fred | 796 |
| published_candidate_paper | schaefer_schwarz_2019_without_prereg | 682 |
| published_candidate_paper | button_nord_neuroscience | 649 |
| published_candidate_paper | motyl_2017_critical_tests | 540 |
| published_candidate_paper | olsson_sundell_2023_social_interventions | 476 |
| published_candidate_paper | kuhberger_2014_main_results | 472 |
| published_candidate_paper | replication_pair_originals_bridge | 431 |
| published_candidate_paper | clinifact_published_primary_pairs | 339 |

:::

### What Is Still Missing

- Plot 4 now has a practical side-point/paper-unit schema, but it still needs a formal deduplication audit across overlapping source families.
- Native-metric rows are still excluded from this D/N-only figure; they need either a parallel dump or explicit facet policy.
- The all-source layer intentionally mixes paper-level candidate rows with pair-side rows, so it should not be read as a single exchangeable statistical sample.
